headline: Tesla’s IPO Was One of the Greatest Ever. Why SpaceX Can’t Hope to Repeat Its Success.
summary: Tesla  stock bounced on Tuesday as CEO Elon Musk reminded investors about where his EV company started and how far it’s come.  Don’t expect SpaceX to follow the same trajectory even as Musk tries to justify SpaceX’s valuation.  The move came after Musk tweeted that Tesla’s IPO market cap was only 0.1% of its current market cap.

headline: Three Free Cash Flow and Quality ETFs Quietly Beating Every Other Smart Beta Strategy in 2026
summary: Smart beta had a confusing first half of 2026, as momentum cooled after a strong 2025, low-volatility lagged a market that kept grinding higher, and dividend growth funds got squeezed by another leg up in yields. The strategies that held their ground share a common screen: companies that generate real cash and earn returns above ... headline: Tesla Was One of the Greatest Stock IPOs Ever. Why SpaceX Can’t Repeat Its Success.
summary: Tesla  stock dipped early Tuesday as CEO Elon Musk reminded investors about where his EV company started and how far it’s come.  The move came after Musk tweeted that Tesla’s IPO market cap was only 0.1% of its current market cap.  The tweet also comes just ahead of SpaceX’s massive IPO, which is expected to raise a record amount of cash, and could value the rocket company at $2 trillion.
